sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁקד

Transliteration: shâqad

Phonetic: shaw-kad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to wake, watch, awake, be alert
    1. (Qal)
      1. to keep watch of, be wakeful over
      2. to be wakeful, wake (as mourner or sufferer)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2451

Part(s) of speech: Verb
